channel.title: Australian-Languages on Hywel Stoakes
channel.description: Recent content in Australian-Languages on Hywel Stoakes

item.title: Australian Languages
item.description: The Sounds of Australian Aboriginal Languages This is a short series of videos aimed at the general viewer that introduces some of the sounds of Australian Languages. (Video Series). This is hosted by the Research Unit for Indigenous Language (RUIL) in the Faculty of Arts at The University of Melbourne. The videos are: -Vowels -Word Initial Velar Nasals -Palatals -Retroflexes -Taps and Trills This series is a general introduction to the sounds of Australian languages and does not represent the full degree of diversity in pronunciation amongst the languages of the Australian continent.
